prompt: Live traffic in Berlin right now

dataWarning: Atlas doesn't have a built-in live traffic feed. Real-time traffic requires integration with external APIs (Google Maps Platform, HERE, TomTom, or OpenStreetMap traffic). Consider: (1) overlaying isochrone reachability zones to show travel times, (2) visualizing road networks with historical congestion patterns, or (3) uploading traffic incidents/counts as GeoJSON points.
